title: Pan-Seared Hake with Korean Namul Salad
description: A flavorful and healthy Korean-inspired dish featuring pan-seared hake and a refreshing side of namul salad.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
2. Season the hake fillets with salt and pepper.
3. Add 1 tablespoon of sesame oil to the pan and sear the hake for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the hake from the pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of sesame oil.
6. Add the Korean chili flakes, garlic, and ginger to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add the namul to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
8. Return the hake to the pan and toss with the namul mixture.
9. Season with soy sauce to taste.
10. Serve immediately, garnished with green onions.
